description_long: This shotgun features a compact, tactical design with a matte black finish and a robust, rectangular receiver. The barrel is short and thick, with a prominent muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting. The stock is a skeletal, folding type with a textured buttplate, designed for portability and ease of storage. A rail system is mounted on top of the receiver, likely for attaching optics or other accessories. The pistol grip is angular and ergonomic, with a squared trigger guard that appears reinforced for durability. The overall appearance suggests a modern, urban-use shotgun built for close-quarters scenarios.
description: A compact, tactical black shotgun with a folding skeletal stock, short barrel, and top rail for accessories. It has an angular pistol grip and a squared, reinforced trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, folding skeletal stock, short barrel, and top rail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the thick barrel muzzle and narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the stock and receiver details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stock's buttplate and the alignment of the top rail.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, elongated, reinforced trigger guard with angular edges
